title: Phippsia airoides
taxonomy: Phippsia airoides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Phippsia, which is a group of plants that are native to the Arctic regions. Phippsia airoides is a perennial plant that is characterized by its white, star-shaped flowers. The plant is also known as Arctic airplant, and it is often found growing in moist, acidic soils. Phippsia airoides is a relatively rare plant, and it is considered to be an important part of the Arctic ecosystem.
